file.content: # Patch: Add unit tests for free-trial CTA filtering in processCTAs ## Metadata adw_id: `` review_change_request: `Issue #1: No unit tests added for the new free-trial CTA filtering logic. The existing processCTAs test block in web-components/test/hydrate.test.js has no cases covering: (1) trial CTAs filtered on plans variants, (2) non-trial CTAs preserved on plans variants, (3) non-plans variants unaffected, or (4) empty-CTA-array edge case after filtering. Resolution: Add test cases to the processCTAs describe block in web-components/test/hydrate.test.js covering the four scenarios above. Severity: tech_debt` ## Issue Summary **Original Spec:** specs/issue-bdf67753-adw-1d78f7d6-sdlc_planner-hide-free-trial-ctas-plan-pages.md **Issue:** The `processCTAs` function in `hydrate.js` was updated to filter free-trial CTAs (those whose `data-analytics-id` matches entries in `FREE_TRIAL_CTA_IDS`) when the variant is one of `PLANS_VARIANTS`. However, no unit tests were added for this new behavior. **Solution:** Add four `it()` test cases to the `processCTAs` describe block in `web-components/test/hydrate.test.js` covering the four scenarios described in the review change request. ## Files to Modify - `web-components/test/hydrate.test.js` — add four test cases to the existing `processCTAs` describe block (after line 284, before the closing `}`). ## Implementation Steps ### Step 1: Add test — trial CTAs filtered on a plans variant Inside the `processCTAs` describe block, add a test that passes a `ctas` field containing a checkout link with `data-analytics-id="free-trial"` and calls `processCTAs` with variant `'plans'`. Assert that the footer element contains zero buttons (the trial CTA was removed). - CTA HTML: `Free Trial` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `0` ### Step 2: Add test — non-trial CTAs preserved on plans variant Add a test with a mix of one trial CTA (`data-analytics-id="free-trial"`) and one non-trial CTA (`data-analytics-id="buy-now"`) calling `processCTAs` with variant `'plans'`. Assert only the non-trial button remains. - CTA HTML: two `` tags, one with `data-analytics-id="free-trial"`, one with `data-analytics-id="buy-now"` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `1`; the remaining button text is `'Buy Now'` ### Step 3: Add test — non-plans variant is unaffected Add a test with the same trial CTA calling `processCTAs` with a non-plans variant (e.g., `'ccd-slice'`). Assert the trial CTA is **not** removed. - CTA HTML: `Free Trial` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'ccd-slice')` - Assert: `footer.children` has length `1` ### Step 4: Add test — all CTAs filtered results in empty footer Add a test where all provided CTAs are trial CTAs, calling `processCTAs` with variant `'plans-v2'`. Assert the footer element exists but is empty. - CTA HTML: two trial links — `data-analytics-id="free-trial"` and `data-analytics-id="seven-day-trial"` - Call: `processCTAs(fields, merchCard, aemFragmentMapping, 'plans-v2')` - Assert: `footer` exists and `footer.children` has length `0` ## Validation ```bash # From the web-components directory cd /Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/bdf67753/web-components npm test -- --grep "processCTAs" ``` Or run the full hydrate test file: ```bash npx wtr test/hydrate.test.js --node-resolve ``` All four new test cases should pass with zero regressions on existing `processCTAs` tests. ## Patch Scope **Lines of code to change:** ~60–80 lines added (four `it()` blocks) **Risk level:** low **Testing required:** Run the `processCTAs` describe block; verify all existing tests still pass and all four new tests pass.

lines: +    it('should filter trial CTAs on a plans variant', async () => {
+ ctas: 'Free Trial',
+    it('should preserve non-trial CTAs while filtering trial CTAs on plans variant', async () => {
+ ctas: `Free Trial
+    it('should not filter trial CTAs on a non-plans variant', async () => {
+ ctas: 'Free Trial',
+    it('should result in empty footer when all CTAs are filtered on plans-v2 variant', async () => {
+ ctas: `Free Trial
+ Seven Day Trial`,
